title: Contract Interaction History
body: Full history of contract interactions for security forensics and incident response.

title: Smart Contract Interaction Risk
body: Score the risk of interacting with any smart contract based on its onchain history and approvals.

title: Solana Program Verifier
body: Before an agent or user interacts with any unknown Solana program, verify its safety via GoldRush: check if the deployed binary matches a verified source build (OtterSec/Sec3/Otter-verified programs list), look up the program ID against known-malicious contract databases, and fetch its historical instruction volume — high usage over 6+ months signals a battle-tested contract. Returns a `verified` / `unverified` / `malicious` enum plus a link to the audit report if one exists.

title: Solana Token Risk Scorer
body: For any SPL token mint address, check 4 critical rug-pull signals via GoldRush: (1) mint authority — can the deployer print unlimited new tokens? (2) freeze authority — can they lock tokens in your wallet? (3) top-10 holder concentration — are 10 wallets holding >80% of supply? (4) liquidity lock — is the Raydium LP locked or can it be withdrawn instantly? Returns a 0–100 composite risk score plus the raw value of each signal so you can explain exactly why a token scored high risk. Wire as a pre-trade guard in any agent pipeline or wallet UI.

title: Token Approval Risk Scanner
body: Scan all active ERC-20 and NFT approvals for a wallet and score each by risk level â€” identify dangerous unlimited approvals, deprecated protocols, and known exploited contracts.

title: Token Risk Analyzer
body: Score tokens for rug-pull signals, ownership concentration, and LP lock status.

title: Transaction Decoded Receipt
body: Fetch a fully decoded transaction receipt including internal transfers, decoded log events, ERC-20/NFT movements, and gas analytics â€” the core of any transaction detail page.
